title: thlaspi tenue
intro: Thlaspi tenue, also known as small-fruited pennycress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its sulfur and glucosinolate content. The health benefits of Thlaspi tenue include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Thlaspi tenue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
